notifications.title: Discord Notifications
notifications.serviceUnavailable: Notification service is unavailable in this build. Set `VITE_NOTIFICATION_API_URL` to enable Discord linking and delivery.
notifications.finishBrowser: Finish the Discord link flow in your browser.
notifications.dmRefused: QLTracker is linked, but Discord still refused the DM check. Retry the install/link flow to test DMs again.

dialog.descriptionWithServer: Configure a Discord DM notification for {{server}}.
dialog.descriptionFallback: Configure a Discord DM notification for this server.
dialog.enabledDescription: Only send DMs while this rule is enabled.

active_free_slots.label: Playing slots left
active_free_slots.description: Notify when a match is this close to filling, using the total active playing slots instead of full server slots.

free_slots.label: Free slots
free_slots.description: Notify when the server has this many free slots or fewer.

min_players.label: Min players
min_players.description: Notify when the server reaches at least this many players.

dialog.totalPlayingSlotsDescription: Use both teams combined, not the per-team size. For a 4v4 server, enter 8. For an 8v8 server, enter 16. This is separate from the full server slot count.
dialog.activeSlotsDescription: This rule will evaluate against {{count}} total active playing slots.
dialog.serverSupportsDescription: This server currently supports up to {{count}} players.

serverList.noServersMatch: No servers match the current filters.

actions.notificationsPublicOnly: Notifications are available only for public servers.
actions.connectDiscordFavorites: Connect Discord on the Notifications page to enable notifications.

drawer.topQeloTooltip: Highest QElo player on this server
drawer.topTrueskillTooltip: Highest TSkill player on this server
drawer.noPlayerData: No player data for this server.

favoriteDialog.fallbackDescription: Assign this server to one of your local favorite lists.
favoriteDialog.listsUnavailable: No favorite lists available. Create a list on the Favorites page first.

passwordDialog.title: Server Password
passwordDialog.fallbackDescription: Enter the password for this server.
passwordDialog.remember: Save this password for future joins

toasts.notificationSaveError: Could not save the notification rule.
toasts.notificationRemoveError: Could not remove the notification rule.

settings.title: Settings
settings.startupDescription: Automatically launch QLTracker when you sign in to Windows.
settings.unavailable: Setting is unavailable in this build.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the language used throughout QLTracker.

favorites.createDialogDescription: Create a list to organize your saved servers.
favorites.playersTooltip: Total live players in this list
favorites.noLists: No lists yet. Create your first list to get started.
favorites.noServers: No servers saved in this list yet.

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: Filter servers by average QElo or TSkill.
